ops.text: Clean-slate retrain chain T0+T0.5+T1 (2026-07-16, manual passes outside the nightly pipeline): (1) export --push from the repaired DB (EmptyWatcherPrompt silent). (2) Freeze-eval's new gate-view guard then exposed 2461 exported gate rows rendering empty — deep positive rewinds past all content + degenerate random negatives; fixed at four layers in commit c3e8035a (stop-before-empty in negatives.py::event_samples AND context_rebuild.py::positive_gate_samples, drop-at-insert in store.record_gate_samples, EmptyWatcherPrompt(view="gate") in export.gate_row) and pruned 2627/17427 gate_sample rows (no positive event lost; dry-run==live; convergence 0; DB snapshotted to feedback.db.pre-prune-20260716). Also reaped 8 orphaned deadlocked scan procs + checkpointed a 1.5GB WAL. (3) Re-export --push: gate 12891/1325, watcher 6012/628, traces 4374/445, sft 3189/335, dpo 470/48, kto 4374/445; digests: watcher train f21c40cac0ad9f88 (test e85dc4a2ec94aae0), gate train 629e72f90d5b1c19 (test 67d5ab514350be28). (4) Canonical clean-slate freeze: gate_eval c7f923eb83d0d850495d080d7951d144ffdb4055d332bb90c09dea1b64972ac5, watcher_eval 69249e2b5525750a752a80d6df0f453079a73c6db48d20c3e82d12092152b07e; second run idempotent no-op. Refresh rule documented as a cc-notes doc; prior eval-v2 frame in ~/.Trash/cc-steer-eval-v2-wiped-20260716.
